comment.body: My understanding of Alma's post is that Trump sees the EU and Russia on a head-on collision course, and he is trying to prevent a clash by putting pressure on Russia and Ukraine at the same time, in the form of a peace agreement - but only until the end of April. After that, the USA will let things take their course in Europe. The European globalists will use ANY means to justify a military confrontation with Russia, even a false flag.

comment.body: precisely. fools game predicting months out .. however we can say with a fairly high degree of probability than Fed will cut at least once through next 2 FOMC (CME group has at 60%; 45% chance of 2 cuts in next 3 meetings), that CPI/PPI will remain cold (rent/energy/food metrics have collapsed in April), and that Mag7 earnings will be reasonably strong (SAP/IBM/Nflx etc have all had strong earnings and/or guidance above estimates for next quarter)

comment.body: China is offering Canada a partnership against the aggressive actions of the United States, reported The Canadian Press agency, citing the Chinese ambassador to Ottawa. Wang Di said in an interview with the agency that China wants to avoid a return to the "law of the jungle." Wang described the actions of the United States as "bullying" and suggested that China and Canada should form a partnership against Washington's undermining of the rules governing global politics and convince other countries to join such a partnership. He referred to Canada as China's "neighbour" across the Pacific.
